testimonials.name: LYNN KUNIHIRA AKKY
testimonials.quote: All my children have gone through Sir Apollo Kaggwa Schools, and I do not regret it at all. The schools brought out the very best in them. My first born scored 4 aggregates and is now at King’s College Budo. Thumbs up to the staff of Sir Apollo Kaggwa Schools for the great work and commitment to excellence.

testimonials.name: KWAGZY BREEZY
testimonials.quote: Sir Apollo Kaggwa Schools moulds what every parent desires their child to become, shaping confident, disciplined, and responsible future leaders. Many head prefects in top secondary schools are proud former students of the institution, a clear reflection of its strong leadership foundation. Pupils are encouraged to discover and nurture their talents here, where excellence and character development go hand in hand.

testimonials.name: CHARITY BYARUBAGA
testimonials.quote: Sir Apollo Kaggwa Schools have set a remarkable academic pace in East Africa, consistently meeting and exceeding expectations without compromise. Great appreciation goes to the administration team and teaching staff for their dedication, commitment, and excellence in delivering quality education.
